final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media cover image (小红书 style) for a pearl milk tea product, with a pink girly aesthetic and a summer refreshing vibe.

Style/medium: needs a "粉色少女风" aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include pearl milk tea (珍珠奶茶) as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a summer, cool and refreshing backdrop — exact scene details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a light, airy summer atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a pink-dominant, soft girly direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be formatted as a 小红书 cover image (vertical, visually striking crop)
Avoid:
